Bash(cd "C:/Users/Mak Tech/Desktop/flightscheck/backend" && "venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
from app.services.flight_service import _generate_mock_flights
from app.models.flight import FlightSearchParams
params = FlightSearchParams\(
    origin_sky_id='LOND', origin_entity_id='27544008',
    destination_sky_id='DUBB', destination_entity_id='27536737',
    date='2026-06-15', adults=2
\)
flights = _generate_mock_flights\(params\)
f = flights[0]
print\(f'Generated {len\(flights\)} flights'\)
print\(f'First: {f.legs[0].carriers[0]} {f.legs[0].flight_number}'\)
print\(f'  {f.legs[0].origin} \({f.legs[0].origin_city}\) -> {f.legs[0].destination} \({f.legs[0].destination_city}\)'\)
print\(f'  Price: {f.currency} {f.price}  Score: {f.score}  Tags: {f.tags}'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:/Users/Mak Tech/Desktop/flightscheck/backend" && "venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import asyncio, json
from app.utils.validators import is_valid_email, is_valid_phone, is_valid_date_string, is_future_date, validate_date_range

tests = [
    \('email valid',    is_valid_email\('john@example.com'\), True\),
    \('email invalid',  is_valid_email\('notanemail'\), False\),
    \('phone E.164',    is_valid_phone\('+1 555 000 0000'\), True\),
    \('phone local',    is_valid_phone\('555-123-4567'\), True\),
    \('date valid',     is_valid_date_string\('2026-06-15'\), True\),
    \('date invalid',   is_valid_date_string\('15/06/2026'\), False\),
    \('future date',    is_future_date\('2027-01-01'\), True\),
    \('past date',      is_future_date\('2020-01-01'\), False\),
    \('date range ok',  validate_date_range\('2026-06-15', '2026-06-22'\), True\),
    \('date range bad', validate_date_range\('2026-06-22', '2026-06-15'\), False\),
]
all_pass = True
for name, result, expected in tests:
    status = 'PASS' if result == expected else 'FAIL'
    if status == 'FAIL': all_pass = False
    print\(f'  {status}  {name}'\)
print\(f'\\\\nAll validators: {\\"OK\\" if all_pass else \\"FAIL\\"}'\)")

Bash(cat > "C:/Users/Mak Tech/Desktop/flightscheck/backend/.env.example" << 'EOF'
# ── Database ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Development \(SQLite — default, no setup needed\):
# DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./skyrequest.db
#
# Production \(PostgreSQL on Render\):
DATABASE_URL=postgresql+asyncpg://user:password@host:5432/skyrequest

# ── SMTP / Email ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com
SMTP_PORT=587
SMTP_USER=your-gmail@gmail.com
SMTP_PASSWORD=your-16-char-app-password
EMAIL_FROM=your-gmail@gmail.com
NOTIFICATION_EMAIL=agency@example.com

# ── Auth ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
JWT_SECRET_KEY=replace-with-a-long-random-secret-min-32-chars
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@example.com

# ── App ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FRONTEND_URL=https://your-frontend.vercel.app

# ── Flight API ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FLIGHT_API_KEY=your-rapidapi-key
EOF)

Bash(cat > "C:/Users/Mak Tech/Desktop/flightscheck/frontend/.env.local.example" << 'EOF'

Bash(cat > "C:/Users/Mak Tech/Desktop/flightscheck/render.yaml" << 'EOF'
services:
  - type: web
    name: skyrequest-api
    env: python
    region: frankfurt
    plan: free
    rootDir: backend
    buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt
    startCommand: uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
    healthCheckPath: /health
    envVars:
      - key: DATABASE_URL
        fromDatabase:
          name: skyrequest-db
          property: connectionString
      - key: SMTP_HOST
        value: smtp.gmail.com
      - key: SMTP_PORT
        value: "587"
      - key: SMTP_USER
        sync: false
      - key: SMTP_PASSWORD
        sync: false
      - key: EMAIL_FROM
        sync: false
      - key: NOTIFICATION_EMAIL
        sync: false
      - key: JWT_SECRET_KEY
        generateValue: true
      - key: ADMIN_EMAIL
        sync: false
      - key: FRONTEND_URL
        sync: false
      - key: FLIGHT_API_KEY
        sync: false

databases:
  - name: skyrequest-db
    databaseName: skyrequest
    plan: free
EOF)
